title: erysimum pusillum subsp. microstylum
intro: Erysimum pusillum subsp. microstylum, also known as the dwarf wallflower, is a plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. The medicinal properties of Erysimum pusillum subsp. microstylum include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds, which are derived from its flowers and roots. This plant is known for its various health benefits, including its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its use in treating skin conditions and wounds due to its antimicrobial properties. Erysimum pusillum subsp. microstylum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is traditionally used in herbal medicine to support overall well-being.
